text: Trust in God, but tie your camel.
Patience is the key to relief.
The world is a bridge; cross it but do not build upon it.
A kind word can attract even the snake from his nest.
He who has health has hope, and he who has hope has everything.
The wound of words is worse than the wound of swords.
Write the bad things that are done to you in sand, but write the good things that happen to you on a piece of marble.
A book is a garden carried in the pocket.
If you want to go fast, go alone. If you want to go far, go together.
The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago. The second best time is now.
When the student is ready, the teacher will appear.
Examine what is said, not who speaks.
He who does not travel does not know the value of men.
Knowledge is a treasure that follows its owner everywhere.
Sticks in a bundle are unbreakable.
The greatest wealth is contentment with little.
Silence is the best reply to a fool.
A man's worth is determined by his two smallest organs: his heart and his tongue.
The one who plants trees, knowing that he will never sit in their shade, has at least started to understand the meaning of life.
An army of sheep led by a lion would defeat an army of lions led by a sheep.
If you have much, give of your wealth; if you have little, give of your heart.
A wise man associating with the vicious becomes an idiot.
Four things come not back: the spoken word, the sped arrow, the past life, and the neglected opportunity.
Every sun has to set.
Wishing does not make a poor man rich.
Dawn does not come twice to wake a man.
Do not stand in a place of danger trusting in miracles.
A chameleon does not leave one tree until it is sure of another.
Ask the experienced rather than the learned.
He who peeps through the keyhole may lose his eye.
The fruit of silence is tranquility.
Your tongue is your horse — if you take care of it, it takes care of you; if you betray it, it betrays you.
What is learned in youth is carved in stone.
The hand of God is with the community.
He who laughs last did not get the joke.
The eye cannot rise above the eyebrow.
Live together like brothers, and do business like strangers.
If speech is silver, then silence is gold.
The dogs bark, but the caravan moves on.
The ego is a veil between humans and God.
Yesterday I was clever, so I wanted to change the world. Today I am wise, so I am changing myself.
The wound is the place where the light enters you.
Let yourself be silently drawn by the strange pull of what you really love.
Where there is ruin, there is hope for a treasure.
The lion is most handsome when looking for food.
Do not be satisfied with the stories that come before you. Unfold your own myth.
You were born with wings, why prefer to crawl through life?
Raise your words, not your voice. It is rain that grows flowers, not thunder.
Travel brings power and love back into your life.
Be like a tree and let the dead leaves drop.
